definitions: To be suitable, to fit (e.g., a color, a style).
To happen, to occur (e.g., a holiday on a certain day).
To decline, to diminish (e.g., prices, temperature).
To be taken in, to be fooled (e.g., in a trick).
To fall in love (with 'enamorar-se de' or 'caure bé' for liking someone).
examples: La poma va caure de l'arbre.
Va caure en l'examen de matemàtiques.
Aquest color no em cau bé.
El seu aniversari cau en divendres.
